session.user: Run `ruff check src/ packages/ tests/` from /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report all errors found.
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff check command and report all errors found.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/ packages/ tests/
Run ruff check on src/, packages/, and tests/ directories

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 E501 Line too long (104 > 100) --> src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/plan_update.py:122:101 | 120 | # Step 3: Update plan content via ManagedPrBackend 121 | try: 122 | backend.update_managed_pr_content(repo_root, pr_id, plan_content.strip(), summary=summary or "") | ^^^^ 123 | except RuntimeError as e: 124 | _handle_update_error(f"Failed to update comment: {e}", cause=e) |
E501 Line too long (103 > 100) --> tests/fakes/tests/shared_context.py:191:101 | 189 | resolved_plan_store = plan_store 190 | else: 191 | resolved_plan_store = GitHubManagedPrBackend(resolved_github, resolved_issues, time=FakeTime()) | ^^^ 192 | 193 | return ErkContext( |
E501 Line too long (105 > 100) --> tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_close_pr.py:72:101 | 70 | assert output["comment_id"] == "1000000" 71 | 72 | # Verify the user comment was added (via GitHubManagedPrBackend -> FakeLocalGitHub.create_pr_comment) | ^^^^^
... [93 lines omitted] ...
Found 11 errors.
session.assistant:
ruff check failed: 11 line-too-long errors found
**Summary:** Found 11 E501 (line too long) violations across 4 files.
**Errors by file:**
1. **src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/plan_update.py:122** - Line 104 characters (exceeds 100 char limit) - `backend.update_managed_pr_content(repo_root, pr_id, plan_content.strip(), summary=summary or "")`
2. **tests/fakes/tests/shared_context.py:191** - Line 103 characters - `resolved_plan_store = GitHubManagedPrBackend(resolved_github, resolved_issues, time=FakeTime())`
3. **tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_close_pr.py:72** - Line 105 characters - Comment line: `# Verify the user comment was added (via GitHubManagedPrBackend -> FakeLocalGitHub.create_pr_comment)`
4. **tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_get_plan_metadata.py** - 8 violations at lines 94, 121, 147, 173, 202, 229, 260, 295 - All 104 characters, repeated pattern: `plan_store=GitHubManagedPrBackend(fake_github, fake_gh, time=FakeTime())`
All violations are E501 (line length exceeds 100 character limit).
